focus: Turnover coordination — intake move-out triggers, build PM-approved punch lists, sequence trades to minimize days-to-rent-ready, QC every must-fix with evidence, and certify rent-ready units
goals: Start the day-0 clock within hours of possession confirmation and escalate missing inspection findings on schedule
Deliver a PM-approved punch list with wear-vs-damage recommendations within the configured scope SLA
Publish the dependency-sequenced critical-path timeline and keep it current through Stage 3
Verify every must-fix item with evidence and re-key last before any rent-ready certification
Hand off certified units to leasing with a complete completion record and track leasing ACK to close the pipeline
